pr.title: feat: wire MSA Grader GAS backend into CleverPlatform
pr.body:
## Summary

Integrates the `MSA_Grader-API_Backend` Google Apps Script (GAS) project into the CleverPlatform monorepo and wires it into the gradebook UI so teachers can trigger automated grading.

## Changes

- [x] **Phase 1 — GAS source colocated** (`platform/msa-grader/`)
  - All `.js` and `.html` GAS source files copied from `MSA_Grader-API_Backend`
  - `package.json` with `push`, `pull`, `deploy` scripts (clasp) and `jest` for tests
  - `.clasp.json` for `clasp push/pull` from the monorepo
  - 4 test files (`grader.test.js`, `ocr_verify.test.js`, `sigma.test.js`, `student_profile.test.js`)

- [x] **Phase 2 — GAS Web App `doPost()` dispatcher** (`platform/msa-grader/ApiEndpoint.js`)
  - `doGet(?action=health)` → health check JSON response
  - `doPost({ action, payload })` → dispatches to `gradeStudentWork` or `healthCheck`
  - `gradeStudentWorkForApi_()` orchestrates OCR → markscheme lookup → Claude grading → returns structured marks array

- [x] **Phase 3 — Next.js proxy layer**
  - `platform/lib/msa-grader.ts` — typed helper with `callGraderHealth()` and `callGradeStudentWork()`, attaches Google OAuth token to each GAS request (reuses existing `google-auth-library`)
  - `GET /api/grader/health` — unauthenticated health-check proxy for UI status indicator
  - `POST /api/grader/grade` — teacher-only; calls GAS pipeline and upserts returned marks into `student_marks` with `auto_graded = true`

- [x] **Phase 4 — Supabase migration** (`platform/supabase/migrations/052_add_auto_graded.sql`)
  - `ALTER TABLE student_marks ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS auto_graded boolean DEFAULT false`

- [x] **Phase 5 — Gradebook UI** (`GradebookGrid.tsx`)
  - 🤖 button in each student name cell
  - Modal: test selector, Drive file ID input, optional exam/markscheme ID
  - On confirm → `POST /api/grader/grade` → page reload with fresh marks

- [x] **Phase 6 — Documentation**
  - `platform/.env.local.example` — documents all env vars including `MSA_GRADER_URL` and `MSA_GRADER_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON`
  - `platform/AGENTS.md` — sub-project overview, deployment steps, end-to-end flow

## Configuration needed after merge

1. Deploy the GAS Web App from `platform/msa-grader/`:
   ```bash
   cd platform/msa-grader
   npm install
   clasp login
   npm run push
   npm run deploy   # copy the Web App URL
   ```
2. Set in Vercel / `.env.local`:
   ```
   MSA_GRADER_URL=https://script.google.com/macros/s/.../exec
   MSA_GRADER_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_JSON={"type":"service_account",...}
   ```
3. Run the Supabase migration `052_add_auto_graded.sql`.
pr.author: Copilot
